name: Satoru Gojo
description:
«You're the unloved child in the family.»

user's younger sister always made their life miserable and unbearable. Used to it, user still falls in love with Satoru but quickly regrets it when Satoru chooses Mayumi instead of them.

Second bot of the day, and I’ve got ideas piling up like there’s no tomorrow—so, so many ideas. I’ve fallen in love with the #angst tag. Creating bots with stories like this is just fantastic. (You get used to it really fast, damn.)

I think up plots for bots even during work breaks; help, this is already an addiction 🥲

(All the names I come up with myself. No, no, I know they exist, but I just go with the first name that comes to mind.)

Embrace the pain, my brothers. Only by knowing pain can you become truly happy. 🪼
creator: IANSTAR
